title: Thingamajigs 2 Goodies
description: An addon for Thingamajigs 2 containing miscellaneous goodies!
body:
**Welcome to Thingamajigs 2 Addon: Goodies!**

_This addon brings back balloons, the Converter, springs, and some new features into Thingamajigs 2! A new feature is the Moving Probable Block!_

Additions In The Addon:
* Balloon Blocks - Bouncy and can give you air if popped underwater in the offhand with a sword!
  
* Purifying Water - Heals and saturates players, but is quite hard to mass-produce; made from Purifying Ingredients, all made within the crafting table and another special in-world crafting block (the Converter)

* Sludge - Horribly smelly and hurts players who step in it, along with any clumsy mobs and animals that go in it. Avoid at all costs, or convert it using the Converter. 

* Purifying Crafting Materials - Nuggets, Ingots, and 'globs' for crafting the difficult to obtain Purifying Block

* Purifying Block - Put under a Converter and watch the Purifying Water flow out the top!

* Converter - Allows you to craft in-world with various items, such as sludge and purifying water, to create new crafting items, it also converts standard blocks above it into other types, and can absorb blocks below it to create liquids above!

* Moving Probable Block - A luck-based block that can spawn items/creatures, manipulate the world, help/hurt players, etc. Completely based on how many times it moves in-world!

There are plans for more content, including a new crafting recipe type, in the future.

Thingamajigs 2 is the MC 1.21+ NeoForge version of Thingamajigs 1.

**Why Do I Need This Addon, isn't the content already in Thingamajigs?**

_Thingamajigs 2 doesn't include the content seen in this mod as Thingamajigs 1 (the original Forge mod) did. You'll need this addon to get magic/tech/misc old features back into Thingamajigs 2._

**You must have Thingamajigs 2 in order for this addon to work ([Thingamajigs Mod Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/thingamajigs)).**
